description: Mist is Juniper’s cloud-managed networking platform for wireless, wired, WAN, and location services. It provides APIs to manage organizations, sites, devices, clients, and streaming telemetry from the Mist cloud.
summary: Mist exposes an authenticated REST API at `https://api.mist.com` and an authenticated WebSocket streaming endpoint at `wss://api-ws.mist.com/api-ws/v1/stream`; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
